protein_name: Belongs to the small GTPase superfamily. Rho family. Ubiquitous, with highest levels in neural tissues. Expression is also detected in fetal lung, heart, and brain. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: G protein; G protein, monomeric; G protein, monomeric, Rho
raw_fields.Cellular Component: cell projection; Cul3-RING ubiquitin ligase complex; cytoplasmic vesicle; cytoskeleton; endosome membrane; plasma membrane
raw_fields.Molecular Function: GTP binding; GTPase activity; nucleotide binding; protein binding; protein kinase binding; ubiquitin-like ligase-substrate adaptor activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: actin filament organization; cortical cytoskeleton organization; establishment or maintenance of cell polarity; protein ubiquitination; regulation of actin cytoskeleton organization; regulation of cell shape; signal transduction; small GTPase-mediated signal transduction; ubiquitin-dependent protein catabolic process
